task: Write a Java function using AWS SDK v2 that uploads a single file to S3 bucket
criteria: Uses S3Client or S3AsyncClient from AWS SDK v2; calls putObject with a PutObjectRequest specifying bucket and key; accepts file path or InputStream parameter; throws or handles SdkException; returns PutObjectResponse or void

task: Write a Java function to retrieve an object from S3 and return its content as a string
criteria: Uses S3Client.getObject with a GetObjectRequest; reads response body into a String (e.g., via ResponseBytes or InputStream); specifies bucket and key parameters; handles or declares SdkException; returns a non-null String

task: Write a Java function to list all objects in an S3 bucket with a given prefix
criteria: Uses S3Client.listObjectsV2 or paginator with a ListObjectsV2Request; filters by the given prefix; iterates all pages if paginated; returns a collection of S3Object or key strings; handles or declares SdkException

task: Generate an IAM policy JSON that allows read-only access to a specific S3 bucket
criteria: Valid JSON with Version and Statement fields; Effect is Allow; Action includes s3:GetObject and s3:ListBucket (or s3:Get*/s3:List*); Resource scoped to the specific bucket ARN and its objects (arn:aws:s3:::bucket and arn:aws:s3:::bucket/*); no write or delete actions

task: Generate a CloudFormation template JSON snippet for creating an SQS queue with a dead-letter queue
criteria: Valid JSON with AWSTemplateFormatVersion and Resources; defines two AWS::SQS::Queue resources; main queue has a RedrivePolicy referencing the DLQ ARN and a maxReceiveCount; DLQ is a separate resource; optional MessageRetentionPeriod or VisibilityTimeout attributes

task: Generate an IAM assume role policy JSON for a Lambda function
criteria: Valid JSON with Version and Statement; Effect is Allow; Action is sts:AssumeRole; Principal is Service lambda.amazonaws.com; no extraneous principals or actions

task: Write a regex pattern to extract AWS S3 bucket name and object key from ARN format: arn:aws:s3:::bucket-name/object/key
criteria: Pattern matches the literal prefix arn:aws:s3:::; captures bucket name (alphanumeric and hyphens) in group 1; captures the full object key path after the slash in group 2; does not match malformed ARNs missing the s3::: segment

task: Write a regex pattern to validate AWS VPC CIDR block notation (e.g., 10.0.0.0/16)
criteria: Pattern validates four dot-separated octets each in range 0-255; requires a prefix length between 0 and 32 after the slash; anchored to full string (^ and $); rejects invalid octets like 256 or missing segments

task: Write a regex pattern to extract timestamp and error message from CloudWatch logs formatted as: [TIMESTAMP] ERROR: message
criteria: Pattern matches literal brackets around timestamp; captures timestamp value in group 1; matches literal ERROR: separator; captures the remainder as the error message in group 2; works across varied timestamp formats (ISO 8601, epoch, etc.)

task: Write a Java function using AWS SDK v2 to query a DynamoDB table by partition key
criteria: Uses DynamoDbClient from AWS SDK v2; calls queryPaginator or query with a QueryRequest; sets KeyConditionExpression with the partition key attribute; uses ExpressionAttributeValues with AttributeValue; accepts table name and key value as parameters; returns a list of Map<String, AttributeValue> or typed items; handles or declares SdkException
